[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I love the part when Leo and Vincent fought at the end to the death, and the whole time vincent was an undercover cop"}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "We fought buy guns to the death"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "if you pley it with that one funny homie of yours it mekes it 10 times better"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Addicting, super rewarding when you learn the mechanics"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "frustrating"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "sometimes a little ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥"}, {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Map feels unnecessarily large at times, like there's missing enemies or towns or something"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Most fun I've had playing a game since Skyrim came out"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "has keyboard ui despite using controller"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive"}]}
]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I actually enjoyed the story"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the character, mostly the orcs"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I did enjoy the environments"}, {"aspect": "animation", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "look janky AF"}]},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the graphics and stuff are nice"}, {"aspect": "voice_acting", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the talking people are good"}, {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "you don't have a clue where to go"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "lore", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "i cant speak much on the lore"}, {"aspect": "controls", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the controls are a bit finnicky"}, {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the AI threshold is honestly quite stupid"}, {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "They also spot you through the smallest holes ever"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the graphics are honestly quite beautiful"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the backgrounds are similarly detailed and a feast for the eyes"}, {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the character models are the UGLIEST things"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "buy it on this mega spring sale and dont bother paying 40 bucks for it"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Crap optimistion"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The fact I have to stream the game for it to run is crazy"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "games visuals are muddy as hell even on max settings"}, {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Do the devs even bother patching this any more?"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "A 30fps that dips when you do just about anything"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it already crashed on me"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the black screen counted as \"game-play\" time"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "so poorly optimized"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "a $70 price tag for this heap is offensive"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "what is the point of a so-called open world game when one is able to interact with almost nothing"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The game looks and feels completely unfinished"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it runs smooth"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "plays well"}, {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "now there's a pause button"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The game has great atmosphere"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "game-play"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "crazy amount of miss-able achievements"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "this game plays very poorly"}, {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "non replayable missions"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fully immersive world that pulls you in and keeps you interested"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Great game, great storyline"}]}
]
